disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, severe, sharp right lower abdominal/pelvic pain of about 2 hours' duration, constant and not relieved by paracetamol
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and when did it start?
What does the pain feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on suddenly about two hours ago, low down on my right side. It's a sharp, ripping pain and it hasn't let up at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and a near-fainting episode when trying to walk, with pallor and sweatiness (proxy for volume loss)
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint or dizzy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I tried to walk to the bathroom I went really dizzy and nearly blacked out. I feel clammy and my partner says I've gone pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Scant dark vaginal spotting since yesterday, lighter than a usual period
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any vaginal bleeding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's been a bit of dark, brownish spotting since yesterday, but it's much lighter than my normal period.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Last menstrual period approximately 6 weeks ago; the patient assumed her cycle was simply irregular and did not think she could be pregnant
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask... my period's late, maybe six weeks? But my cycle's always been a bit all over the place, so I didn't really think anything of it. I haven't done a pregnancy test.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I honestly assumed it was just my cycle being irregular like it usually is.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New aching pain at the tip of the right shoulder, coming on around the same time as the abdominal pain
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pain anywhere else, like your shoulder or the tip of your shoulder?
Any pain in your chest or shoulder?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Actually, yes — I've got this odd ache at the very top of my right shoulder that started around the same time. I don't know why.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is worsened by any attempt to move or sit up and the patient prefers to lie completely still
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the pain better or worse?
Can you move around, or do you need to stay still?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't move — any time I try to sit up it hurts more and I feel like I'll faint, so I'm just lying dead still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications and no known drug allergies
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular medications and no allergies that I know of. I just took some paracetamol earlier and it didn't touch the pain.
